destinations.evidence: PayloadStore::resolve always delegates to resolve_kind with WaitForPending, so default resolution waits for a pending build path rather than asking for Earliest.

equivalence_argument: The public default resolve path uses WaitForPending directly, preserving consensus-side eager fetch behavior without fixed delays.
notes: This maps the default store resolve API.
rationale: The primary diff changes PayloadStore::resolve from PayloadKind::Earliest to PayloadKind::WaitForPending and documents the behavior as avoiding fixed delays on the consensus side. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: PayloadStore::resolve must call resolve_kind with PayloadKind::WaitForPending, not Earliest, so consensus-side eager fetching blocks until at least one payload build completes or fallback resolution applies.
suggested_falsification_tests: Call PayloadStore::resolve on a handle with an in-progress build and assert it issues a WaitForPending resolve command rather than Earliest.
summary: Default payload resolve waits for pending builds.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call PayloadStore::resolve for an in-progress job and assert the underlying command is PayloadKind::WaitForPending.
title: Default payload resolve waits for pending build
